title: solanum xanthocarpum
intro: Solanum xanthocarpum, also known as the yellow fruit nightshade, is a plant species belonging to the Solanaceae family. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory and gastrointestinal disorders. Herbal preparations of Solanum xanthocarpum include decoctions, infusions, and powders, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
